meaning: n.[希神]羊皮盾,保护,庇护,支持
examples: The space programme will continue under the aegis of the armed forces.
Aegis ships also are receiving other technology upgrades.
Two Aegis ships patrolling the Sea of Japan could theoretically defend the nation from attacks.
That will include deploying Raytheon's antimissile missiles aboard Aegis destroyers and land-based Patriot batteries.
